candidates.why: Direct top-line sales/revenue line; equals Total Revenue in preview and is the more specific reported revenue label.
Explicit total revenue line; same values as sales line, useful as fallback across years.

Balancing row; should not be preferred over explicit COGS rows.

candidates.why: Selling overhead bucket, but includes separate depreciation detail below; more subtotal-like than the 'Other' component.

Equity/NCI line, not interest expense.
NCI line, not interest expense.

candidates.why: Equity component only, not full book equity.

Appears to be equity excluding minority interest, since adding Minority Interest reconciles to Total equity in preview years.
Appears to include minority interest based on reconciliation to Total Equity plus Minority Interest; not preferred for BE when MIB is mapped separately.
This is minority interest, not parent book equity.

variables.notes: Chose Total Equity because it appears to exclude non-controlling interests, avoiding double count when MIB is added separately.

candidates.why: Explicit non-controlling interest line.
Explicit minority interest label; simplest direct mapping.
